note: Ranged editing-permission markers. <w:permStart>/<w:permEnd> delimit a region a group (edGrp) or specific user (ed) may edit inside a protected document. Positioned paragraph children like bookmark markers: permStart opens the region, permEnd (type=permEnd, id only) closes the matching id. Use a shared id to pair them. colFirst/colLast scope the permission to a table-column range.

id.description: marker id (required). permStart and its matching permEnd share the same id.

edGrp.description: editing group allowed in the region (ST_EdGrp).

ed.description: specific user (e.g. domain\user or email) allowed to edit the region.

colFirst.description: first table column (0-based) the permission applies to, for a table-column range.

colLast.description: last table column (0-based) the permission applies to, for a table-column range.
